data.body: DONE (commit pending). --output json on create/claim/transition/reopen/delete with the epic-spec shapes; close-path compact stdout leak fixed. Library now parses engine --output json (single source); create drops the extra show() call. MCP create->{id,alias} (mismatch C), claim typed; transition/reopen stay dict (from= keyword). 4 lifecycle schemas + conformance + probe section. delete stays CLI-only by design. Full suite 1293 passed; probe 134 passed.
